latex:
You have $\$60$ to spend on supplies for a camping trip. You buy $4$ water bottles that cost $p$ dollars each and $5$ granola bars that cost $q$ dollars each. Which expression represents the amount of money you have left over?

a. $\bigcirc$ $60 + (4p + 5q)$

b. $\bigcirc$ $60 - 4p + 5q$

c. $\bigcirc$ $60 - (4p + 5q)$

d. $\bigcirc$ $60 + 4p - 5q$
